summary: Iteration 5 frontend-only testing of the /demo interactive product tour. All 11 test scenarios from the review request passed. Demo page renders with all required data-testids, 6 chapter buttons, controls (play/pause, prev, next, replay), auto-advance from chapter 1 to chapter 2 verified within 8.5s, clicking chapter-3 immediately switches to AI scene with correct caption, pause halts progress and resume continues it, Navbar (desktop + mobile) and Footer Demo links present, hero 'Watch 50-second demo' CTA on landing navigates to /demo, sitemap.xml contains /demo entry, and 0 console errors collected during ~25s of playback.
critical_code_review_comments: Demo.jsx is 485 lines — within tolerance but trending toward the 700-line guideline; consider extracting the 6 Scene components into /app/frontend/src/pages/demo/scenes/ if more chapters are added.
useEffect on [playing, chapterIdx] uses Date.now()-based RAF loop which is robust; eslint-disable for exhaustive-deps is intentional and acceptable here.
Minor: the goTo() function sets playing=true even when called from replay() at the end, which is the desired behaviour; no issues.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 demo player verified end-to-end. CHAPTER_DURATION=7200ms; an 8.5s wait reliably advances from chapter 0 (signup) to chapter 1 (fill). Progress width on chapter dots is queryable via [data-testid="demo-chapter-{i}"] > div .style.width — useful for pause/resume verification. Mobile menu uses plain anchor (a[href="/demo"]) without a data-testid, but the link is reachable.
